# Story 2.5: Checkout Summary + Payment Method + Order Build (Snapshot + Code)

Status: done

<!-- Generated by bmad-create-story workflow on 2026-05-13. -->

## Story

As a cashier,
I want chọn phương thức thanh toán (tiền mặt / chuyển khoản / thẻ) và build đơn hoàn chỉnh với mã đơn cục bộ + UUID v7 + snapshot fields,
so that bước cuối checkout chuẩn bị payload đủ cho lưu local + sync server.

## Acceptance Criteria

1. **CheckoutSummary dưới CartPanel:** Given CartPanel có items + discount đã set, when cashier xem CheckoutSummary (UX-DR9) phía dưới CartPanel, then hiển thị subtotal, discount amount nếu có, total nổi bật, PaymentMethodSelector, và nút `Hoàn tất đơn`; label `Tổng tiền`/amount phải 28-36px bold và dùng `formatVnd()` integer VND.
2. **PaymentMethodSelector:** Given PaymentMethodSelector (UX-DR13), when cashier chọn phương thức, then radio group có 3 option `Tiền mặt` default, `Chuyển khoản`, `Thẻ`; mỗi đơn chỉ có 1 phương thức (`cash|transfer|card`), selected state rõ, touch target ≥44px, có label accessible.
3. **Order code util:** Given util `pos-web/src/shared/lib/order-code.ts`, when developer mở, then function `generateOrderCode(deviceId, sequence): string` trả format `YYYYMMDD-POSXX-NNNN` (vd `20260509-POS01-0042`) theo client local date; sequence của ngày hiện tại + deviceId được tính từ Dexie `db.orders` dựa trên `soldAt` trong local day và auto-increment an toàn.
4. **UUID v7 util:** Given util `pos-web/src/shared/lib/uuid.ts`, when developer dùng, then export thêm/giữ `uuidv7()` hoặc wrapper tương đương từ package `uuid@11+`; mọi `clientOrderId` dùng UUID v7, tuyệt đối không dùng v4 hoặc `crypto.randomUUID()` cho order id.
5. **LocalOrder builder:** Given builder `pos-web/src/features/orders/builder.ts`, when developer call `buildLocalOrder(cart, paymentMethod, deviceId)`, then trả `LocalOrder` schema gồm `clientOrderId`, `orderCode`, `deviceId`, `soldAt` ISO 8601 UTC, `menuVersionAtSale` từ `db.menuMeta.menuVersion`, `items` snapshot, `discountAmount`, `total`, `paymentMethod`; `total === subtotal - discountAmount`.
6. **Snapshot immutability:** Given cart items từ Story 2.4, when builder tạo order items, then copy mọi `productNameSnapshot`, `unitPriceSnapshot`, `labelSnapshot`, `priceDeltaSnapshot`, `note?`, `quantity`, `lineTotal` từ cart hiện tại vào order payload; builder không mutate input cart và không lookup live product/menu để refresh item snapshots.
7. **Checkout UI state:** Given state Zustand `checkoutStore` là UI state riêng, when cashier bấm `Hoàn tất đơn`, then `isCheckingOut=true`; actual Dexie write/sync/receipt sẽ wire ở Story 2.7, nên Story 2.5 không được finalize order hoặc gọi API.
8. **Builder tests:** Given unit test `builder.ts`, when test build với cart có 2 items + fixed discount 10000 + percentage cases, then assert snapshot fields đúng, order code format đúng, `soldAt` UTC có hậu tố `Z`, VND integer, `total` đúng, và builder không mutate input cart.
9. **UI tests + gates:** Given POS tests, when render cart có item, then verify default payment method, changing method, totals/discount display, checkout button sets checking state/disabled loading state without writing Dexie order; required gates pass and are recorded: `cd pos-web && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run build` plus security grep no `localStorage`, `sessionStorage`, `dangerouslySetInnerHTML` in app source.

## Tasks / Subtasks

- [x] Inspect existing Story 2.4 cart/checkout seam before editing (AC: 1,2,7,9)
  - [x] Read `pos-web/src/features/orders/cart-store.ts`, `pos-web/src/features/orders/types.ts`, `pos-web/src/features/orders/components/cart-panel.tsx`, `pos-web/src/features/orders/components/discount-control.tsx`, `pos-web/src/routes/pos/pos-shell.tsx`, and `pos-web/src/routes/pos/pos-shell.test.tsx`.
  - [x] Preserve Story 2.4 behavior: cart remains mounted in the right POS aside, line item quantity/remove/note works, discounts validate, totals update instantly, product grid/category/search and OptionModal are unchanged.
- [x] Add checkout UI state and payment types (AC: 2,7)
  - [x] Add `PaymentMethod = 'cash' | 'transfer' | 'card'` and `LocalOrder`/`LocalOrderItem` types in `features/orders/types.ts` or a dedicated `features/orders/order-types.ts` if clearer.
  - [x] Create `pos-web/src/features/orders/checkout-store.ts` with Zustand UI state `{ paymentMethod: 'cash', isCheckingOut: false }` and actions `setPaymentMethod`, `startCheckout`, `finishCheckout`/`resetCheckoutState`.
  - [x] Keep checkout store UI-only; do not store server state or persisted order queue here.
- [x] Implement checkout summary UI in existing CartPanel area (AC: 1,2,7,9)
  - [x] Create `pos-web/src/features/orders/components/payment-method-selector.tsx` with accessible radio group labels: `Tiền mặt`, `Chuyển khoản`, `Thẻ`; ensure each option has ≥44px target and clear selected style not relying only on color.
  - [x] Create `pos-web/src/features/orders/components/checkout-summary.tsx` or refactor the current CartPanel totals section into it.
  - [x] Reuse existing `calculateCartTotals()` and `formatVnd()`; do not duplicate discount/totals math in components.
  - [x] Replace current disabled `Hoàn tất` placeholder with enabled `Hoàn tất đơn` only when cart has items; on click call `startCheckout()` and show loading/disabled state. Do not clear cart, create Dexie order, show receipt, or kick sync in this story.
- [x] Implement order code + sequence helpers (AC: 3)
  - [x] Create `pos-web/src/shared/lib/order-code.ts` with `generateOrderCode(deviceId, sequence)` and local-date formatting (`YYYYMMDD`) using client local time.
  - [x] Add helper in `features/orders/builder.ts` or `features/orders/order-sequence.ts` to compute next sequence by counting existing `db.orders` rows for same `deviceId` whose `soldAt` falls within local day start/end; return count + 1.
  - [x] Treat current Dexie `orders` placeholder as a read source only for sequence. If schema typing must be widened for story tests, do the minimal compatible change and leave full pending-order schema/indexes to Story 2.7.
- [x] Implement UUID v7 wrapper/export (AC: 4)
  - [x] Reuse existing `pos-web/src/shared/lib/uuid.ts`, which already imports `v7 as uuidv7` from `uuid@11.1.1` and exports `createUuidV7()`.
  - [x] If AC naming needs direct `uuidv7()`, export an alias without breaking existing `createUuidV7()` imports.
- [x] Implement `buildLocalOrder()` (AC: 5,6,8)
  - [x] Create `pos-web/src/features/orders/builder.ts` exporting async `buildLocalOrder(cart, paymentMethod, deviceId)` or equivalent that can read Dexie `menuMeta` and sequence.
  - [x] Read `MENU_META_ID` / `db.menuMeta` for `menuVersionAtSale`; define a safe fallback or explicit error only if menu metadata is missing in tests/demo. Prefer preserving offline POS flow.
  - [x] Generate `clientOrderId` with UUID v7, `soldAt` via `new Date().toISOString()` UTC, `orderCode` with next sequence, and copy cart snapshots deeply.
  - [x] Compute `discountAmount` using Story 2.4 `calculateCartTotals(items, discount)`; never recompute product/option prices from live menu records.
  - [x] Ensure returned payload is plain serializable data suitable for later Dexie write and `/api/v1/orders` sync body.
- [x] Add tests (AC: 1-9)
  - [x] Add `pos-web/src/shared/lib/order-code.test.ts` for format, zero-padding, local-date part, device id passthrough.
  - [x] Add `pos-web/src/features/orders/builder.test.ts` covering fixed discount, percentage discount, snapshots/options/note, UUID v7 shape, UTC `soldAt`, menu version read, sequence increment by same local day/device, and no input mutation.
  - [x] Extend `pos-web/src/routes/pos/pos-shell.test.tsx` or add component tests for checkout summary/payment selector/start checkout state.
  - [x] Run and record required gates and security grep in Dev Agent Record.

## Dev Notes

### Scope boundaries

- This story owns **checkout summary UI**, **payment method selection**, **order-code/UUID generation**, and **local order payload building**.
- This story does **not** own Dexie pending order persistence, sync engine kick, receipt modal/print, backend orders schema/API, void/cancel order, or clearing cart after success. Those are Stories 2.6-2.8+.
- `Hoàn tất đơn` in this story only transitions UI into checking-out state. Story 2.7 wires it to `db.orders.add({ status: 'pendingSync' })`, `syncEngine.kick()`, receipt, and cart clear.

### Current implementation state to preserve/read before coding

- `features/orders/cart-store.ts` is the current source of cart semantics. It already provides immutable cart snapshots, discount state, `calculateCartTotals()`, `sanitizeDiscount()`, quantity/remove/note actions, and clear/reset.
- `features/orders/types.ts` currently has `CartItem`, `CartItemInput`, `CartDiscount`, `CartItemOptionSnapshot`; extend these rather than creating competing cart types.
- `components/cart-panel.tsx` currently renders line items, discount control, totals, and a disabled `Hoàn tất` button. Story 2.5 should replace the totals/button area with CheckoutSummary while preserving all line item behavior.
- `components/discount-control.tsx` already validates fixed/percentage discount and calls `setDiscount`; do not reimplement discount input.
- `db/dexie.ts` currently has `orders!: Table<PendingOrderPlaceholder, string>` with schema `orders: 'id, createdAt'`, plus `menuMeta`. Full order persistence/index schema belongs to Story 2.7, but builder tests may need minimal type compatibility for counting by `soldAt`/`deviceId`.
- `shared/lib/uuid.ts` already wraps `uuid` v11 `v7`; use it for `clientOrderId` and preserve Story 2.3/2.4 tempId behavior.

### Architecture and guardrails

- Source of truth on conflict: `_bmad-output/planning-artifacts/architecture.md` and `_bmad-output/project-context.md`.
- FE layering: `routes/` may import `features/` and `shared/`; `features/orders` may import `shared/` and `db`; `shared/` must not import `features/`, `routes/`, or `db`.
- File names kebab-case; React components PascalCase; Zustand actions camelCase verbs.
- VND money is integer only. No decimal currency, no floats in displayed/stored amounts.
- API/sync payload fields must match architecture sample: `clientOrderId`, `deviceId`, `soldAt`, `menuVersionAtSale`, `items[]`, `discountAmount`, `total`, `paymentMethod`.
- Snapshot immutability is mandatory: `productNameSnapshot`, `unitPriceSnapshot`, `labelSnapshot`, `priceDeltaSnapshot`, and `menuVersionAtSale` represent sale-time data and must not be refreshed from live menu after order build.
- Security regressions remain blockers: no token use in `localStorage`/`sessionStorage`, no `dangerouslySetInnerHTML`.

### UX/accessibility requirements

- CheckoutSummary remains in the fixed right POS panel; product/category/search interactions must not unmount or reset cart/checkout state unexpectedly.
- Payment options need clear text labels and selected state; do not use icon/color-only indication.
- Touch targets for payment options and `Hoàn tất đơn` should be ≥44px.
- Total stays the strongest visual element: `Tổng tiền` and amount 28-36px bold, VND formatted, no decimals.
- Disabled/loading state for checkout must be obvious and calm. If cart is empty, button remains disabled with existing empty state context.
- Keep microcopy Vietnamese and operationally clear: `Tiền mặt`, `Chuyển khoản`, `Thẻ`, `Hoàn tất đơn`, `Đang chuẩn bị đơn...` if loading.

### Previous story intelligence

- Story 2.4 delivered the right CartPanel, DiscountControl, full cart store actions, line item note editing, remove confirmation, and POS integration tests. Build on those files; do not replace the cart architecture.
- Story 2.4 final gates passed: typecheck, lint, tests, build; grep found no `localStorage`, `sessionStorage`, `dangerouslySetInnerHTML` in app source.
- Story 2.3 introduced UUID v7 wrapper and minimal cart add seam; review explicitly required UUID v7 from `uuid` package v11 and no v4/randomUUID substitution.
- Recent commits: `b8aa5b2 feat(pos): complete story 2-4 cart panel`, `0de7c45 feat(pos-web): add option modal cart flow`, `1f303d0 feat(pos): complete story 2-2 product browsing`, `959f343 feat: complete story 2-1 menu sync`.

### File structure guidance

Expected files to add/update:

```text
pos-web/src/
├── db/
│   └── dexie.ts                         # UPDATE only if minimal order placeholder typing/schema compatibility is needed
├── features/orders/
│   ├── builder.ts                       # NEW buildLocalOrder + sequence/menu meta integration
│   ├── builder.test.ts                  # NEW builder unit tests
│   ├── checkout-store.ts                # NEW payment method + isCheckingOut UI state
│   ├── types.ts                         # UPDATE PaymentMethod/LocalOrder types
│   └── components/
│       ├── cart-panel.tsx               # UPDATE compose CheckoutSummary in totals area
│       ├── checkout-summary.tsx         # NEW totals + payment selector + Hoàn tất đơn
│       └── payment-method-selector.tsx  # NEW radio group
├── routes/pos/
│   └── pos-shell.test.tsx               # UPDATE POS checkout UI coverage
└── shared/lib/
    ├── order-code.ts                    # NEW generateOrderCode()
    ├── order-code.test.ts               # NEW unit tests
    └── uuid.ts                          # UPDATE optional uuidv7 alias, preserve createUuidV7()
```

### Testing Standards

- Use Vitest + React Testing Library already configured in `pos-web`.
- For builder tests, seed fake IndexedDB/Dexie similarly to existing POS/menu tests; freeze or fake timers for deterministic `soldAt`/order code date.
- Reset Zustand stores between tests to avoid payment/cart state leakage.
- Required commands:

```bash
cd pos-web && npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm test && npm run build
```

- Regression scan command suggestion:

```bash
grep -R "localStorage\|sessionStorage\|dangerouslySetInnerHTML" -n pos-web/src --exclude='*.test.ts' --exclude='*.test.tsx'
```

## QA Results

### Review Findings

- [x] [Review][Patch] `orderCode` date can diverge from `soldAt` around midnight [`pos-web/src/features/orders/builder.ts:45-53`, `pos-web/src/shared/lib/order-code.ts:9-11`] — `buildLocalOrder()` captures `soldAt`, computes sequence for that timestamp, but then calls `generateOrderCode(deviceId, sequence)` without passing the same date; `generateOrderCode()` uses a fresh `new Date()` via `localOrderDatePart()`. If midnight is crossed between these calls, the order code date/sequence can be for a different local day than `soldAt`, violating AC3/AC5 consistency. Resolved by capturing `soldAtDate` once, passing it to sequence + order-code generation, and adding a unit test proving the same date instance drives `soldAt` and `orderCode`.
